landing.heroBannerAlt: Kora AI Workspace — Knowledge Hub, feeling logs, projects, Ask AI, and reminders in one platform
landing.heroBadge: Knowledge + team pulse + AI in one place

inAppBrowser.androidSteps: Tap the menu (⋮) in the top-right corner, then choose Open in browser or {{browser}}.

story.introNot: We didn't start by asking how to build AI.
story.introBut: We started by asking why talented people still exhaust themselves on work that shouldn't take so much energy.
story.scene: One day we saw a quiet teammate who carried more than anyone noticed—every meeting, every note, every follow-up, the same questions again and again, and the team's context on her shoulders alone.
story.absence: When she was away, work stalled. No one knew the status. No one remembered what was agreed—and no AI understood that context.
story.belief: The problem isn't the people. It's a system that makes people remember everything on their own.
story.purpose: Kora exists so knowledge doesn't leave with a person, meetings don't end when the room empties, and everyone can work with AI that understands real context.
story.tribute: Kora's inspiration came from one quiet teammate—who may never know that her exhaustion became the starting point of this product.

quote.line1: We didn't build AI to replace people at work.
quote.line2: We built it so the people who carry the most don't have to carry everything alone.

landing.footerTagline: Organizational knowledge + team pulse for teams that ship.

setup.welcomeSubtitle: Let's set up your organization for meeting intelligence
setup.startHereTitle: Start here: what to fill first
setup.startHereStep1: Step 1 (required): Organization name used across your workspace.
setup.startHereStep2: Step 2 (recommended): Add your name and contact email for invitations and notifications.
setup.startHereStep3: Step 3: Review details and create your organization.
setup.startHereTip: Tip: Use a real team email to receive reminders and escalation digests.
setup.organizationNameHelp: Required. Use your company, team, or department name. Example: Product Team APAC.
setup.contactNameHelp: Recommended. Helps identify organization owner and default contact person.
setup.contactEmailHelp: Recommended. Used for reminders, invitations, and important updates.
setup.emailForUpdates: Your email for important updates and invitations
setup.reviewHelp: Please confirm all details before creating. You can update organization settings later.
setup.firstMemberIntro: You can add the first team member now, or skip this step and add members later.
setup.temporaryPasswordHelp: Share this password with the new user only if they cannot use the invitation link.
setup.invitationFallback: Invitation email was not sent. Share this link manually.

profile.title: Personal Profile
profile.description: Update your personal details and account password.
profile.changePasswordDesc: Use a strong password with at least 8 characters.
profile.mustChangePasswordDesc: Your account was created with a temporary password. Please set a new password before continuing.
profile.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Choose how you want to be notified about task updates and reminders.
notifications.inAppHelp: Show task updates and reminders inside the app.
notifications.emailHelp: Send reminders and task updates to your account email.
notifications.pushHelp: Receive browser or installed-app alerts even when Kora is in the background. On iPhone, add the app to your Home Screen first, then open it from there.
notifications.pushEvents: Push alerts are sent when you are reassigned, when a due date or priority changes, when status changes, and for due/overdue reminders.
notifications.pushUnsupported: Push is not supported in this browser. Try Chrome on desktop/Android, or install the app on iPhone.
notifications.iosInstallTitle: iPhone: install to Home Screen first
notifications.iosInstallStep1: Open this site in Safari (not Chrome).
notifications.iosInstallStep2: Tap Share, then "Add to Home Screen".
notifications.iosInstallStep3: Open Kora from the new icon, go to Profile, and tap Enable push.
notifications.iosNeedsHomeScreen: On iPhone, push works only after you add Kora to the Home Screen and open it from that icon.
notifications.iosPermissionDeniedHelp: Notifications were blocked. On iPhone: Settings → Notifications → Kora → Allow Notifications.
notifications.setupInstallHelp: Install Kora for faster access and reliable mobile alerts.
notifications.setupInstallIosHelp: On iPhone, add the app to your Home Screen before enabling push.
notifications.setupInstallIosReturn: After adding to Home Screen, open the app from the new icon and return here.
notifications.setupNotifyHelp: Tap to allow alerts for task updates and reminders.
notifications.setupNotifyWaitingInstall: Complete step 1 first, then this button will activate.
notifications.bannerBody: Install the app and allow notifications so you do not miss task updates.
notifications.permissionDenied: Notification permission was denied by the browser.
notifications.vapidMissing: Push is not configured on the server yet (VAPID keys missing).
notifications.loginRequired: Please sign in again to enable push notifications.

invite.description: Set your password to activate your Kora account.

projectKnowledge.title: Project Knowledge Onboarding
projectKnowledge.description: Bring an ongoing project's TOR, requirements, old minutes, and delivery notes into a reviewed baseline before Rubjob answers project questions.
projectKnowledge.addSourceHelp: Paste text from TOR, requirements, old minutes, action logs, or timeline documents. Extraction creates a draft baseline for PM review.
projectKnowledge.fileUploadHelp: Supported: TXT, MD, CSV, TSV, DOCX, PDF, XLSX. The app uses the uploaded file name as the title and the file's last modified date as the document date.
projectKnowledge.selectFilesFirst: Please choose at least one file first.
projectKnowledge.filesImportedWithFailures: Imported {{successCount}} file(s). {{failedCount}} file(s) could not be processed:
projectKnowledge.filesAllFailed: No files were imported. {{failedCount}} file(s) could not be processed:
projectKnowledge.fileTooShort: The extracted text is too short to create project knowledge.
projectKnowledge.extractFailed: The file was saved, but AI extraction failed.

projectKnowledge.sourceTitlePlaceholder: e.g. TOR v1.0, Requirements workshop, May decision log
projectKnowledge.contentPlaceholder: Paste the source content here. Keep project-specific names, dates, owners, decisions, requirements, and risks.
projectKnowledge.validation: Please add a title and at least 20 characters of source text.
projectKnowledge.sourceCreated: Source saved. Run extraction when ready.
projectKnowledge.emptyDraft: Extraction finished but no structured items were detected yet.
projectKnowledge.noSources: No project knowledge sources have been added yet.

generalNotes.title: General Notes
generalNotes.description: Capture extra project insight, different participant viewpoints, or ideas that were not presented in the meeting so Ask AI can reason with broader project knowledge.
generalNotes.composeHelp: Choose the project first, then write the note. Public notes can support shared Ask AI answers; private notes stay visible only to you.
generalNotes.noteTitlePlaceholder: Optional short title. If blank, the app uses the first line.
generalNotes.noteContentPlaceholder: Write your perspective, extra context, assumptions, decisions heard elsewhere, or ideas not yet shared with the team.
generalNotes.visibilityPublicHelp: Visible to project members and available as Ask-AI evidence.
generalNotes.visibilityPrivateHelp: Visible only to you and excluded from shared Ask-AI evidence.
generalNotes.noProjectSelected: Choose a project to start taking notes.
generalNotes.empty: No general notes saved for this project yet.
generalNotes.validationContent: Please write at least 10 characters for the note.
generalNotes.whyBody: People in the same meeting can have different perspectives, and sometimes useful ideas or field knowledge never make it into the official discussion. These notes preserve that context for later search and AI analysis.

1.title: Choose project
1.description: Pick the project that this note belongs to.

2.title: Write note
2.description: Capture the idea, concern, context, or independent observation.

3.title: Save
3.description: Store the note with the selected visibility for later search and AI context.

feelingLogs.title: Feeling Log
feelingLogs.description: Private reflections for yourself. Rubjob analyzes your entry gently and only shares derived insights with leaders when needed.
feelingLogs.privacyNote: Only you can read your raw entries. Managers see derived summaries without your name.
feelingLogs.placeholder: Write how you feel today. Type @ to mention a teammate if relevant.
feelingLogs.mentionHint: Use @ in the text or pick someone from suggestions. Mentions stay contextual, not public gossip.
feelingLogs.savedPending: Saved. Rubjob will summarize entries every 3 days at 02:00.
feelingLogs.pendingAnalysis: Waiting for the next batch summary (every 3 days at 02:00).
feelingLogs.batchScheduleNote: Entries are stored immediately. AI summaries run every 3 days at 02:00, grouped by recorder and mentioned people.
feelingLogs.empty: No entries yet. Start with how you feel today.
feelingLogs.insightsPrivacy: This view shows derived insights only. Raw journal text and author identity are hidden.
feelingLogs.frequentMentionsHelp: Shown when someone is mentioned more than 5 times in the last 30 days.
feelingLogs.insightsEmpty: No leadership insights yet for this period.

meetings.title: Meeting Studio
meetings.description: Upload a meeting recording, transcribe it, and publish a structured minute template in one flow.
meetings.startHereTitle: Start here: what to do first
meetings.startHereHelp: New users usually get stuck on where to begin. Follow this order once, then reuse it for later meetings.
meetings.startHereStep1: Choose the project and set the meeting date/time first so the note is stored in the right place.
meetings.startHereStep2: Upload the recording or paste a transcript if you already have one. If transcription is disabled, you can still continue manually.
meetings.startHereStep3: Use the template fields to capture the summary, decisions, risks, actions, and next steps before saving.
meetings.startHereTip: Tip: when you're not sure, start with Objective and Executive Summary. The rest can be refined later.

guide.label: Guided flow
guide.hoverHint: Hover or focus a step to see the tip. You can still skip steps when your organization does not use them.

step1.title: Import meeting content
step1.description: Pick the project and time, then upload a file, record live, or paste a transcript, and run transcribe/analyze.

step2.title: Compose the minutes
step2.description: Review and refine the objective, summary, decisions, risks, and follow-up tasks.

step3.title: Review and save
step3.description: Check the full minutes preview, then save the meeting.

meetings.rawTranscriptHint: Raw text from audio, live recording, or documents — edit before sending to AI analysis.
meetings.transcriptPlaceholder: Upload a file to transcribe or paste raw text here, then click Analyze with AI.
meetings.detectedMetaHint: After you upload and process the minutes file, the system will auto-fill meeting title and date/time here. You can still edit them.
meetings.uploadHelp: Supports audio/video for transcription, or TXT, CSV, DOCX, PDF, and XLSX documents for text extraction and analysis.
meetings.supportedFileTypes: Supported: audio/video, TXT, MD, CSV, TSV, DOCX, PDF, XLSX
meetings.uploadedFileLastModifiedPlaceholder: Shown after you choose a file

fileReadErrors.pdfImageOnly: This PDF may be image-only and text could not be extracted.
fileReadErrors.pdfGeneric: This PDF could not be read.
fileReadErrors.docxGeneric: This DOCX file could not be read.
fileReadErrors.xlsxInvalid: This XLSX file structure is invalid or unsupported.
fileReadErrors.xlsxGeneric: This XLSX file could not be read.
fileReadErrors.csvGeneric: This CSV/TSV file could not be read.
fileReadErrors.textGeneric: This text file could not be read.
fileReadErrors.unsupportedType: This file type is not supported yet.

meetings.templateHelp: Fill the steering update template sections. The preview updates live.
meetings.previewHelp: This is the meeting note that will be saved into the system.

template.consultantNotesPlaceholder: AI will suggest weak spots, things to clarify, or items to strengthen before saving.

checklist.empty: No checklist items yet. Let AI map them from the minutes or add manually.
checklist.importanceHelp: High score raises focus even when the due date is later.

status.analysisTakingLong: AI is still analyzing the document. This is taking a bit longer than usual...
status.analysisTimedOutFallback: Analysis timed out. The app will continue using extracted document text so you can keep working.
status.savedRedirecting: Meeting saved. Redirecting to project continuity...
status.uploadedOnly: Recording uploaded. Transcription is disabled, so you can paste the transcript manually.

progress.title: Current processing status
progress.subtitle: This may take some time
progress.failedHint: Some step failed. Please review the error above and try again.

steps.validatingInput: Check input file and meeting context

backgroundJob.started: Transcription and analysis started in the background. You can navigate away — we'll notify you when it's done.
backgroundJob.completedDescription: {{fileName}} is ready to review in Meeting Studio
backgroundJob.emptyResultDescription: {{fileName}} — no transcript was returned. The file may be silent, the server may have timed out, or ASR may be unavailable. Open Meeting Studio to retry or paste a transcript manually.
backgroundJob.saveRequiredHint: Not saved to history yet — use Save meeting in Meeting Studio
backgroundJob.failedDescription: Open Meeting Studio for details and try again

errors.sessionAtRequired: Meeting date and time is required.
errors.selectRecording: Please choose a recording file first.
errors.unsupportedFileType: This file type is not supported. Use audio/video, or TXT, CSV, DOCX, PDF, XLSX.
errors.transcriptionGatewayTimeout: Transcription took too long or the proxy closed the connection (often before API ASR_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS applies). Try a shorter file, paste a transcript, or redeploy the web service after nginx timeout updates.
errors.emptyTranscript: Transcription finished but returned no text. Check the audio file or paste a transcript manually.
errors.emptyTranscriptForAnalyze: Add raw text in the box below before analyzing.
errors.ownerRequiredForChecklist: Please assign an owner for every checklist item before saving
errors.dueDateRequiredForChecklist: Please set a valid due date for every checklist item before saving
errors.fileTooLarge: File is too large (max 100 MB). Please use a smaller recording and try again.
errors.playgroundNotFound: Upload service was not found. Please refresh the page and try again.
errors.playgroundGateway: The audio processing server is unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.transcriptionUnavailable: Upload succeeded, but automatic transcription is unavailable. Please type or edit the transcript below.
